chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-576 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 28.11.2025 Syed Shafique Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondents No.2 & 5 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State ***** As a last and final chance this is the fourth occasion on which none has appeared on behalf of the applicant, nor has any intimation been received. In the meanwhile, learned counsel for respondents No.2 and 5 has submitted a statement, apparently filed by the applicant before the Court of Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate-III, Matiari, which is taken on record. In the said statement, the applicant has claimed to have forgiven the accused. Learned A.P.G. confirms the above understanding as the statement is submitted in the Sindhi language. As the applicant and his counsel have remained absent for the last four consecutive dates of hearing and today also none has appeared, it prima facie appears that the applicant and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Although the statement submitted by the counsel for respondents No.2 and 5 does not meet the procedural requirements (not an application, not under oath, etc.), nonetheless, in order to bring closure, the instant application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
